name: City Transit Simulator: Bus Driving Game
summary: City Transit Simulator: Bus Driving Game puts you in the driver’s seat of realistic city buses in immersive VR. Navigate busy streets, follow traffic rules, pick up passengers, and complete routes across detailed urban environments. Experience smooth controls, authentic bus physics, dynamic traffic, and day-night cycles. Designed for comfort and realism, this simulator delivers a true-to-life public transport driving experience on Meta Quest.
